name: Falcon Self-Priming F-100

name: Tormac Booster T-900
description: Single-pump constant pressure booster system ensuring standard pressure flow across luxury showers.

name: Falcon Centrifugal Monoblock F-MONO-75
description: High performance domestic monoblock pump for reliable water transfer to overhead tanks.

name: Tormac Mini Jet T-JET-50
description: Compact self-priming jet pump, excellent for domestic supply, washing, and garden watering.

name: Falcon Multi-Stage Silent F-MS-120
description: Ultra-silent multi-stage residential pressure pump for high comfort multi-story residential buildings.

name: Tormac Submersible Borewell T-SUB-R3
description: 3-inch slim borehole submersible pump, designed for private residential drinking water wells.

name: Falcon V6 Submersible F-600
description: Heavy-duty water cooled submersible pump designed for high dynamic lift irrigation from deep borewells.

name: Falcon Openwell Submersible F-300
description: Corrosion resistant openwell submersible pump, perfect for open wells, canals, and river beds.

description: Dynamic balanced horizontal openwell pump suitable for low water level reservoirs and farms.

name: Tormac V4 Borewell Submersible T-V4-300
description: V4 water-filled submersible pump, excellent for medium borewells in small-scale farming and horticulture.

name: Falcon V8 High Discharge F-V8-750
description: High discharge V8 submersible pump engineered for large-scale crop flooding and high dynamic lift.

name: Tormac Agricultural Monoblock T-AGRI-500
description: Surface centrifugal monoblock pump for open farm irrigation channels and canal water drawing.

name: Tormac Multi-Stage Booster T-BOOST
description: Multi-stage pressure booster system with intelligent pressure sensing controls for tall corporate parks.

name: Tormac High Pressure Inline T-LINE
description: Vertical multi-stage inline pumps in Grade 304 stainless steel, supplying superior hygiene water networks.

name: Falcon Commercial Booster F-COM-BOOST-50
description: Multi-pump automatic booster set, ideal for shopping malls, hotels, and commercial high-rises.

name: Falcon Vertical Multistage Inline F-VMS-30
description: Inline stainless steel vertical multi-stage pump for commercial water treatment and RO plants.

name: Tormac Fire-Fighting Pump T-FIRE-100

name: Tormac Sewage Drainage T-DRAIN-200

name: Tormac Heavy Centrifugal T-CENT

name: Falcon High Capacity F-MAX
description: Heavy-gauge cast iron construction double suction high volume pump for flood relief and intake stations.

name: Falcon Process Chemical F-CHEM
description: Chemical process pump with high chemical grade mechanical seals for acid and chemical fluid transfers.

name: Tormac High Temp Boiler Feed T-BOILER-75
description: Multi-stage high temperature boiler feed pump designed for power plants and textile processing mills.

name: Falcon Heavy Slurry F-SLURRY-100

name: Tormac Grade 316 Chemical T-CHEM-316
